title: gentiana verna var. aestiva
intro: Gentiana verna var. aestiva, also known as spring gentian, is a plant species within the gentian family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive growth habits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gentiana verna var. aestiva include its potential to treat digestive issues, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and support liver health. Gentiana verna var. aestiva can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
